API Reference

All Exported Functions

QRacahSymbols.clear_caches! — Method
clear_caches!()

Empties all internal LRU caches (numeric, exact models, and evaluations). Useful for freeing up memory during massive state-sum computations.

source
QRacahSymbols.evaluate_classical — Method
evaluate_classical(m::CycloMonomial)

Evaluates the symbolic monomial at the limit q -> 1.

source
QRacahSymbols.evaluate_exact — Method
evaluate_exact(res::ExactResult, ::Type{T}=Complex{BigFloat}; prec=256)

Projects a full ExactResult (6j or 3j symbol) into a floating-point number.

source
QRacahSymbols.evaluate_exact — Method
evaluate_exact(ev::ExactValue, [T=Complex{BigFloat}]; prec=256)

Projects a self-contained ExactValue into a floating-point number.

source
QRacahSymbols.evaluate_generic — Method
evaluate_generic(m::CycloMonomial, k::Int, ::Type{T}=Complex{BigFloat}; prec=512)

Evaluates a symbolic cyclotomic monomial using log-sum-exp for numerical stability.

source
QRacahSymbols.evaluate_generic — Method
evaluate_generic(res::GenericResult, k::Int, ::Type{T}=Complex{BigFloat}; prec=512)

Evaluates a full 3j or 6j GenericResult at level k.

source
QRacahSymbols.horner_eval — Method
horner_eval(poly_elem, z::Complex{BigFloat})

Evaluates a Nemo cyclotomic polynomial element at a complex point z using a zero-allocation Horner's method.

source
QRacahSymbols.q3j — Function
q3j(j1, j2, j3, m1, m2, [m3], [k]; mode=:generic)

Evaluates the quantum 3j-symbol. If m3 is omitted, it defaults to -m1-m2.

source
QRacahSymbols.q6j — Function
q6j(j1, j2, j3, j4, j5, j6, [k]; mode=:generic, T=Float64, prec=256)

Evaluates the quantum 6j-symbol. If k is omitted, only :generic and :classical modes are valid.

source
QRacahSymbols.qdim — Function
qdim(j, [k]; mode=:generic)
fsymbol(j1, j2, j3, j4, j5, j6, [k]; mode=:numeric)
rmatrix(j1, j2, j3, [k]; mode=:generic)

Access standard SU(2)_k category data.

source
QRacahSymbols.qint — Function
qint(n::Int; mode=:generic)
qint(n::Int, k::Int; mode=:exact, T=Float64)

Returns a representation of the quantum integer [n]_q. The mode determines the choice of representation:

  • :generic : Returns a symbolic CycloMonomial factorization (requires only n).
  • :exact : Returns the exact algebraic representation in the cyclotomic field Q(ζ).
  • :numeric : Returns the numerical floating-point value using the stable sine formula.
source
QRacahSymbols.qint — Method
qint(n::Int; mode=:generic)
qint(n::Int, k::Int; mode=:exact, T=Float64)

Public API for quantum integers.

source
QRacahSymbols.qinteger — Method
qinteger(n, k; mode=:exact)

Returns the exact algebraic representation of [n]_q in Q(ζ).

source
QRacahSymbols.CycloMonomial — Type
CycloMonomial

Represents a product of cyclotomic polynomials evaluated at q.

source
QRacahSymbols.ExactValue — Type
ExactValue{T}

A self-contained exact algebraic value (like a quantum dimension or integer) in the SU(2)_k cyclotomic field.

source
